arts.ttl: Jorthy Mokio: Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester City are among the Premier League giants following the progress of 16-year-old Ajax sensation Jorthy Mokio. Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice

arts.ttl: 16-year-old Chelsea prospect scores on his first start for the U21s in victory over Manchester United
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Under-21s made it back-to-back victories in the Premier League 2 with a win against Manchester United on Friday night. The Chelsea U21s side, managed...

arts.ttl: Director reveals agent offered Aston Villa player and Chelsea man to club – Explains reason for snubbing duo
arts.sum: Inter Milan were offered opportunities to sign Aston Villa’s Marco Asensio and Chelsea’s João Félix in the winter market. That’s according to Inter sporting director Piero Ausilio, and he revealed this during a chat with Sport Mediaset. His comments are relayed by Alfredo Pedullà. The 29-year-old joined Aston Villa on loan from Paris Saint-Germain, while The post Director reveals agent offered Aston Villa player and Chelsea man to club – Explains reason for snubbing duo appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms Chelsea injury blow and makes 'unbelievable' Aston Villa claim
arts.sum: England international Madueke limped off in the recent 3-0 defeat to Brighton and Hove Albion and becomes the latest player in Chelsea's ranks to suffer an injury setback. Enzo Maresca has confirmed that Chelsea will be without Noni Madueke when they head to Aston Villa this evening.

arts.ttl: 'Rotten' - Chris Sutton and Paul Merson agree as they make Aston Villa v Chelsea prediction - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Former Villa players - Chris Sutton and Paul Merson both agree that today is the day Villa return to winning ways in the Premier League - and by the same scoreline too. Aston Villa welcome Chelsea to Villa Park this Saturday and the Lions are taken to see off the out of form Blues by two pundits

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'identify Jhon Duran replacement' as they're linked with £41m transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa are on the look-out for a new centre forward in the summer, having sold - and banked a big sum for - Jhon Duran in the January transfer window. Villa have banked sizeable amounts of money in recent windows, however; Duran's sale to a club in the Saudi Pro League followed another deal Villa concluded in the summer when Moussa Diaby fetched a fee in the same ballpark - he completed a move to Al-Ittihad.

arts.ttl: We simulated Aston Villa vs Chelsea to predict Premier League clash
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to avoid a third defeat in a row when they face Aston Villa in the Premier League later today. The last meeting between Chelsea and Villa saw the Blues win 3-0 at Stamford Bridge, with Maresca's side having won two of the last six meetings against Unai Emery's team.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery explains why he is 'optimistic' about burgeoning Aston Villa talent
arts.sum: Young right-back Andres Garcia joined Aston Villa from La Liga 2 side Levante in January Aston Villa boss Unai Emery believes Andres Garcia’s mentality will take him far.

arts.ttl: Man United weigh up swap deal as Aston Villa consider Marcus Rashford transfer option
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's future will come under the spotlight once again in the summer following the culmination of his loan spell with Aston Villa - and there would appear to be a number of options on the table, from further afield, for the forward. United are eager to bring the 20-year-old midfielder to the club and are willing to offer Rashford in any deal, but Villa are likely to have a say one way or the other on where the attacker's long-term future lies once this campaign concludes.
